ddls:
CREATE TABLE "house_types" (
  "house_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each house type */,
  "house_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the house type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the house type */,
  "average_sqft" INTEGER /* Average square footage for properties of this type */,
  "average_price" INTEGER /* Average price for properties of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("house_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_codes" (
  "status_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the status is active */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the status is final */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price change */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price change */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price after the change */,
  "old_price" INTEGER /* Price before the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the price change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" INTEGER /* Price at which the property was sold */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission percentage or amount paid to the agent */,
  "financing_type" TEXT /* Type of financing used for the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "company" TEXT /* Name of the real estate company the agent works for */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Agent's license number */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the agent has been in the business */,
  "ratings" REAL /* Average rating of the agent based on user feedback */,
  "specialties" TEXT /* List of specialties or areas of expertise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_listings" (
  "agent_listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing */,
  "commission_agreement" TEXT /* Details of the commission agreement between the agent and the seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_listings_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the buyer */,
  "preference" TEXT /* Buying preferences of the buyer */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the buyer */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the buyer */,
  "preferred_neighbourhoods" TEXT /* List of preferred neighbourhoods for the buyer */,
  "preferred_agents" TEXT /* List of preferred agents for the buyer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyer_searches" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date of the search */,
  "search_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for the search */,
  "search_results" TEXT /* List of property IDs that matched the search criteria */,
  "search_duration" INTEGER /* Time taken to complete the search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buyer_searches_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "open_houses" (
  "open_house_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each open house */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing */,
  "open_date" TEXT /* Date of the open house */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Time of the open house */,
  "attendees" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the open house */,
  "feedback_summary" TEXT /* Summary of feedback received during the open house */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("open_house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., buyer, agent) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating provided by the user */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response from the agent or seller to the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighbourhoods" (
  "neighbourhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighbourhood */,
  "neighbourhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighbourhood */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the neighbourhood is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the neighbourhood is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the neighbourhood is located */,
  "average_property_value" INTEGER /* Average property value in the neighbourhood */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the neighbourhood */,
  "public_school_rating" INTEGER /* Average rating of public schools in the neighbourhood */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities in the neighbourhood */,
  "transportation" TEXT /* List of transportation options available in the neighbourhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighbourhood_id")
)
